2026 VIRUS Weightlifting Series 2 Championships

Sep 10, 2026 - Sep 13, 2026 | Fort Worth Convention Center | Fort Worth, TX, United States

Registration 

  • Registration

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Adaptive Athlete Registration

    An adaptive athlete is someone with a disability as defined by the ADA as a physical or mental impairment that substantially limits one or more major life activities, a person who has a history or record of such an impairment, or a person who is perceived by others as having such an impairment. Additional information on participating as an adaptive athlete is available here.

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Texas-Oklahoma WSO Championships Registration

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Qualifying Totals

    View

  • Event Policy

    View

  • Edit Entry

    Athletes can make changes to their weight class and entry total before Verification of Final Entry.

    View, opens in a new tab

Information 

  • Tickets

    View

  • Book a Hotel

    Book at the Hilton Fort Worth.

    Book at Fairfield by Marriott (includes free parking).

  • Live Stream

    View

  • Preorder Photo Packages

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Preliminary Schedule

    TBA

  • Final Schedule

    TBA

  • Start List

    TBA

  • Full Results

    TBA

  • Media Credentials

    All media must apply for media credentials for all USAW national events. All media members are REQUIRED to have 1) current U.S. Center for Safe Sport training, and, 2) effective March 2026, MUST ALSO HAVE A VALID BACKGROUND CHECK ON FILE to be approved for a credential.

    Credential approval/denial emails are typically sent 1-2 weeks before the start of competition. Background checks typically take five days to turn around, meaning that if you wait until the week of a competition to apply for a background check, you may not be approved for the competition. Please click here to submit your information to NCSI and start your background check.


    Please contact USAW at media@usaweightlifting.org with any questions.

    View, opens in a new tab

Location: Fort Worth, TX

Venue: Fort Worth Convention Center

Competition Dates: September 10-13, 2026

Qualification Period: August 13, 2025 – August 13, 2026


Registration Opens: January 1, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Early Bird Registration ($145)

Closes: July 30, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Regular Registration ($175)

Closes: August 13, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Late Registration ($375)

Closes: August 27, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Preliminary Schedule Released: August 15, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT

Verification of Final Entries: August 31, 2026 - 10:00-10:30 a.m. MT

Final Schedule Released: September 2, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT
